meaning: n.干城章嘉峰(喜马拉雅山东部的山脉)
examples: The most rewarding goal is a three- to four-week trek from the one-yak town of Taplejung to the north and south base camps of Kanchenjunga.
Hidden deep in a remote corner of eastern Nepal, Kanchenjunga rises to 8, 586m and encompasses a conservation area and ecological hotspot the size of Mauritius.
Be warned, the trekking on Kanchenjunga is tough.
